heading: Training & Apprenticeships
intro: We are proud of our commitment to developing and training young people. It's been part of how we work since day one in 2006.
body: We've supported apprenticeship placements through the JTL Training Scheme as well as independent arrangements, equipping trainees with real, industry-relevant skills on live commercial sites, not just in a classroom. Our training is delivered under our NICEIC accreditation, so apprentices learn to the same professional standard we hold every qualified electrician to.
cta: Interested in an apprenticeship or trainee position? Get in touch via our contact page or email info@totalelectricsolutions.co.uk. We recruit out of both our Orpington and Farringdon offices.
